title: ResourceStages
description: GameStages addon that loads a resourcepack based on your levels.
body:
# Description
GameStages addon that loads a resourcepack based on your levels.

# How to use?
Create or open resource_stages folder in minecraft directory. Create a folder for each stage and place your resources there.

![File Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0afd19ce9dc62a331f93ae1a8ce7060666e9c5be.png)

# Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/S4jGnHZudq0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Known issues
Not all resources and textures are instantly changed after a level change. This happens because many mods and the game itself caches textures when reloading resources, ResourceStages tries to partially bypass it, but to completely reload use F3 + T keybind.
